news.title: UK Institute Is Hunting for Dangers Lurking in AI
news.snippet: The government’s A.I. Security Institute, staffed by alumni from OpenAI and Google, is becoming a model for countries grappling with A.I.’s emerging risks.

news.title: One Job That Is Growing in the A.I. Era? Cybersecurity Experts.
news.snippet: Demand for security engineers has surged as artificial intelligence generates a glut of new code and models like Anthropic’s Mythos create new concerns.

news.title: Our Field Trip to Google I/O + A Sit-Down With Sundar Pichai + System Update
news.snippet: “This is the only recent gathering of a large number of people where mentions of A.I. did not produce a large chorus of boos.”

news.title: Sundar Pichai Understands Why People Are Anxious About A.I.
news.snippet: After a busy Google I/O, the company’s chief executive sits down with the hosts of “Hard Fork” to discuss the future of Google Search, how he’s using A.I. agents and his advice for college graduates.

news.title: Trump Cancels Signing of Executive Order Granting Oversight of A.I. Models
news.snippet: The president said he postponed the executive order, which would give the government power to evaluate A.I. models before their release, over concerns about “aspects of it.”

news.title: Gov. Gavin Newsom to Sign Executive Order Aimed at A.I. Job Loss
news.snippet: Gov. Gavin Newsom issued an executive order to explore an overhaul of labor policies to deal with potential mass job displacement from artificial intelligence.

news.title: Soundtrack to 8,000 Job Cuts: A Meta Worker’s Layoff-Themed A.I. Songs
news.snippet: On a dark day of layoffs at Meta, one employee responded by creating an internal radio station that plays songs about job cuts — generated by artificial intelligence, of course.

news.title: OpenAI Prepares to File for an I.P.O. in Coming Weeks
news.snippet: OpenAI would be one of the most highly anticipated potential initial public offerings, in what is set to be a major year of I.P.O.s for Silicon Valley.

news.title: Meta Lays Off 8,000 Employees, as A.I. Casualties Mount
news.snippet: Employees have signed petitions against being tracked by A.I. and were trying to figure out who had been let go on Wednesday, as the Silicon Valley giant tries to transform into an A.I.-first company.

news.title: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions
news.snippet: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.

news.title: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
news.snippet: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".

news.title: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
news.snippet: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.

news.title: Meta settles social media addiction case with US school district
news.snippet: The trial had been set as a test case for 1200 other school districts making similar claims.

news.title: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
news.snippet: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.

news.title: SpaceX files for stock market debut that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
news.snippet: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX

news.title: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
news.snippet: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.

news.title: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
news.snippet: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.

news.title: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial
news.snippet: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.

news.title: Elon Musk has lost yet another legal battle. Why he'll still keep fighting
news.snippet: Musk has lost his high-profile lawsuit against OpenAI, but is not likely to change his aggressive style.

news.title: Tech Life
news.snippet: We talk to an expert about the risks from AI hackers

news.title: Topo Designs Rover Trail Pack Is the Best Backpack I’ve Ever Used
news.snippet: Unsurprisingly, the Denver gorpcore brand that makes many of the best bags in the world has delivered a perfect backpack.

news.title: Everyone is navigating AI security in real time — even Google
news.snippet: We're in the transition period -- all of us.

news.title: I tried Amazon’s Bee wearable and am both intrigued and slightly creeped out
news.snippet: Like other AI wearables, Amazon's Bee offers an odd combination of convenience and privacy anxiety.

news.title: SolarSquare in talks to raise up to $60M as India’s rooftop solar market draws major VC interest
news.snippet: SolarSquare could be valued at up to $500 million in the financing expected to close next month.

news.title: These special phone and app features can help protect you from spyware
news.snippet: Apple, Meta, and Google offer special security modes that provide your devices more secure against targeted spyware attacks. Here are how those modes work, what they do, and how to switch them on.

news.title: Ferrari is using IBM’s AI to create F1 superfans
news.snippet: IBM and Scuderia Ferrari HP take TechCrunch inside how they are redefining the fan experience.

news.title: Nuclear startup Deep Fission says it’s going public, again, and I have questions
news.snippet: Deep Fission is seeking an IPO that could raise $157 million, though investors may have trouble buying the nuclear startup's story.

news.title: Elon Musk has given up on solar power (on Earth)
news.snippet: Elon Muks's xAI has gone all in on natural gas, while SpaceX is obsessed with orbital data centers. What happened to the "solar-electric economy" he promised?

news.title: Peec, one of Berlin’s rising startups, more than doubled annualized revenue in months to $10M, sources say
news.snippet: Peec, which helps brands track their presence in AI searches, offers proof of a key trend among European startups.

news.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
news.snippet: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

news.title: Blue Origin cleared to fly New Glenn mega-rocket after April mishap
news.snippet: Jeff Bezos' rocket company confirmed an engine failure led to the loss of an AST SpaceMobile satellite last month, but offered little detail.

news.title: 机器人力传感器龙头再获数亿融资，上汽、中芯等抢先入局
news.snippet:
硬氪获悉，近日，六维力传感器企业蓝点触控宣布完成C++轮数亿元人民币融资，本轮由上汽金控、尚颀资本领投，由中芯聚源、正大机器人以及厚为资本跟投。本轮融资将主要用于新产品研发、生产数智化建设以及全球市场拓展。
  蓝点触控半年完成了三轮亿元级融资，此次融资距上一轮C+轮融资仅一个月。股东阵容目前已囊括红杉中国、宁

news.title: 华为具身大脑一号位做类脑智能世界模型，对标JEPA，获亿元级融资｜硬氪首发
news.snippet:
作者｜黄楠
  编辑｜袁斯来
  硬氪获悉，具身智能大脑公司「具脑磐石」完成新一轮亿元级融资，本轮融资由具备深厚类脑与具身产业背景的顶尖产业资本领投，老股东及多家顶尖基金复投和跟投，多维资本担任独家财务顾问。同时，更新一轮融资也在同步交割中。
  资金将重点投入核心技术研发、人才团队扩容及全球化市场拓展，以加速认知世界模型（Cognitive Wor

news.title: 从服务沉默玩家，到技术外溢至千行百业：游戏+AI的下一站是什么？
news.snippet:
文丨小葵
  编辑丨果脯、刘士武
  2026年GDC大会上，《和平精英》策划副总监薛冰披露了一组数据。
  AI队友周末活跃玩家突破1770万，累计1.1亿人体验过AI功能，单局消息互动70条，麦克风开启率高达75%，超过了真人双排的历史峰值。

news.title: 对话VITURE姜公略：什么才是XR眼镜该有的样子？
news.snippet:
过去十年，XR（扩展现实）赛道始终陷在一种怪异的叙事里——
  在从业者高呼着“下一代计算平台”的宏大愿景时，资本市场也曾在元宇宙的热潮中疯狂押注，而一旦落地到消费端，这个行业却始终未能摆脱极客玩具的宿命。
  从Google Glass的黯然退场，再到一众VR/AR厂商的折戟，XR行业在跌宕中，迎来了前所未有的冷静时刻。
  行业的艰辛在于，尽管所

news.title: 圆桌对话：下一个杀手级AI产品，会出现在哪个赛道？| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
news.snippet:
下一个杀手级AI产品，是眼镜、是Agent，还是某个尚未命名的“物理世界入口”？这场圆桌没有标准答案，却达成一个共识：单纯套壳大模型的应用注定短命，只有长期在线、连接物理世界、能完成真实交互闭环的产品，才可能成为下一个百亿级赛道。从AI眼镜到具身智能，入口之争已悄然打响。
  硬件先行还是生态为王？C端规模还是B端付费？最终指向同一个逻辑：纯套壳应用、弱交互硬件注定被淘汰，只有

news.title: 圆桌对话：当AI进入产业前线：未来最稀缺的AI人才，会是谁？| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
news.snippet:
稀缺的，到底是懂AI的人，还是懂业务的人？
  一个反直觉的判断——懂AI这件事正在快速贬值，而能在关键低频决策中做出判断的人，才是未来的稀缺品。高频重复的工作最容易被AI替代，但在打造爆品、建立品牌等低频高影响力的决策上，人的判断依然不可替代，企业AI转型的最大卡点也不是技术或数据，而是“想不到应用场景”， 当前AI的利润大头仍在基础设施层，应用端的ROI尚未完全释放，但拐点

news.title: 圆桌对话：人才特种兵：“AI原生人才”与“产业老炮”的共生手册| 2026AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会
news.snippet:
真正AI原生的人，甚至不会来这个现场。但对于那些积极转型的20%，如何找到、培养并留住他们，这里有一本实战手册。
  只有1%的企业是AI原生企业，20%积极拥抱变化，80%在苦苦挣扎；人才亦然。圆桌深入探讨了企业“赶时髦招AI人才”的焦虑、通过黑客松内部挖掘AI人才的方法、以及“事业留人、文化留人”的留存策略。
  以下为圆桌对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

news.title: 何小鹏的赌局：GX狂降12万，换一场不能输的冲高
news.snippet: 在理想L9 LIvis之后，小鹏GX的最终定价也大幅跳水，从近40万的预售价降至27万的起售价，“9系的产品，8系的价格”，小鹏产品矩阵负责人吴安飞概括。下调12万元，效果立竿见影：发布会第二天，小鹏集团港股股价一度涨幅超过8%；上市后12小时，大定订单数突破24863辆。Ultra旗舰版订单占比超过80%，而旗舰版里纯电车型占比过半——何小鹏原本以为增程版销量会高于纯电。</

news.title: 十年出货超10万台，越疆以全栈自研与数据闭环布局具身智能
news.snippet: 5月22日，越疆机器人在广东省具身智能训练场举办“2026越疆工业具身智能生态伙伴研讨会”。作为粤港澳大湾区制造业核心引擎，广东拥有汽车、新能源、3C电子等国家级产业集群，越疆将研讨会设在此地，旨在与客户、伙伴面对面，推动具身智能在真实产线上落地运行。此次活动的成功举办，正是越疆构建以客户为中心、以场景为驱动的具身智能生态的体现。

news.title: 独家丨前美团外卖技术负责人入局餐饮具身模型，「元节智能」获千万级种子轮融资
安克消噪耳机搭载AI音频芯片Thus™ A1，获吉尼斯“最清晰通话”认证
news.snippet: 2026年5月22日，安克创新在深圳总部举办新品发布会，正式发布安克消噪耳机Liberty 5 Pro Max与Liberty 5 Pro，并宣布两款产品获得 “全球通话最清晰的无线蓝牙耳机” 的吉尼斯世界纪录认证。支撑这一认证的，是安克与知存科技历时三年联合研发的首款基于存算

news.title: 联想中国基础设施业务上财年实现两位数增长  刘军解读背后四大驱动力
news.snippet: 5月22日，在联想集团举办的2025/2026财年（2025年4月-2026年3月）暨第四财季业绩沟通会上，联想集团执行副总裁兼中国区总裁刘军在会上透露，联想中国区基础设施业务上财年增长稳健，已进入盈利性快速增长新阶段。面向新财年，联想中国将牢牢把握智能经济新机遇，为客户提供安全、低成本和高精准的Token整合服务。数据显示，联想中国基础设施业务全年收入实现了双位数的同比增长。

news.title: 消息称某厂下一代旗舰机 ID 设计大方向不变、新增 AI 键，预计为小米 18 系列
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 25 日消息，博主 @数码闲聊站 今天在微博透露，某厂下一代旗舰机 ID 设计大方向不变，双尺寸屏幕 LIPO 边框更窄。

news.title: FEVM 推出雷电 5 / OCuLink 显卡坞 FNGT5 PLUS，配备 600W 电源
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 25 日消息，FEVM（奋微）近日宣布推出开放式外置显卡扩展坞 FNGT5 PLUS。其支持雷电 5 与 OCuLink (PCIe Gen4 ×4) 两种连接方式，内置 600W 电源，兼容 TGP＜500W 的显卡。

news.title: 英飞凌德国德累斯顿新晶圆厂即将启用，可见未来停止新厂建设
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 25 日消息，德国半导体企业 Infineon（英飞凌）首席运营官 Alexander Gorski 在接受该国媒体《商报》(handelsblatt) 采访时表示，随着其位于萨克森州首府德累斯顿的大型新晶圆厂的投运，该企业在可预见的未来不会新建任何工厂。

news.title: Edge AI Daily 早报（5月25日）
news.snippet: 谷歌全面改造安全框架应对AI代理风险，Anthropic推进Claude记忆升级与Mythos预览版。TrapDoor供应链攻击同步入侵三大代码仓库，利用AI助手开启新攻击面。AI芯片HBM成本占比升至63%，前五大AI实验室2026年资本支出达8000亿美元。生成式AI视频技术实现好莱坞工业级应用，Meta推出Forum对标Reddit。

news.title: Mythos的面纱，成了Anthropic撬动万亿的杠杆
news.snippet: 谷歌和白宫，都拜倒在一个未公开发布的大模型下。
